titleStmt.title: SII 15.241: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 241. (B.K. No. 205 of 1926-27.) NIḌGUNDI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone inside the Basavaṇṇa temple.

This is dated Śaka 1096, Jaya, Mārggaśīra-paurṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1174 A.D., November 10. The weekday, however, was Sunday. The Sinda chief Vīra-Bijjaḷa stated to have been ruling at this time.

It records a gift of money made into the hands of the Mahājanas in favour of the god Mādhavēśvara whose temple was constructed at Niḍugundi by the donor Karagavaḷaradhishṭhāyaka Mahādēva-daṇḍanāyaka, who is described as the right hand of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Bijjala. It also registers other gifts including one for the maintenance of a satra. The earlier part of the inscription contains a genealogical account of the Sinda chief and a description of the Four Hundred Mahājanas of Niḍugundi. The epigraph is partly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī jayatyāviṣk® gra
viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . svasti samasta jaga taḷa ṁtadaṟoḷu sōma ratnarāśi nāḍe
mesaguṁ . ghanagāṁbhī¨ryyavudī¨rṇnasatva bhṛdrakṣaṇatvaṁ purātana sīmāsthiti tāṁ guṇaguṇalasa
dratnākaratvaṁ dṛḍhadhvanighōṣaṁ puruṣōttamāśrayavenippoḷpiṁ mahādēvanōḷvinoḷō raṁnavenalu jagaṁ sūgayi
kuṁ ratnākaraṁ śrīkaraṁ . mattaṁ . siriya tava¨rmane havaḷada haravari muttugaḷa huṭṭaje caṁdrana tāyi hariyi¨rppa sajjeva
ne ratnarāśiyama¨rdina nidhānaveḷe veṇnuḍanūlu . Ene celviṁ jaḷarāśi suttuvire jaṁbū dvīpa voppippudā vinuta dvīpada madhya
doḷu divijadhātrīṁdraṁ manaṁgoḷvudā kanakādrīṁdrada taṁka bhārata varā viyu bhāra tā kāṁtāsarakuṁtaḷaṁ
bolesaguṁ śrī kuṁtaḷō¨rvvītaḷaṁ . śrīmajjanasēvyaṁ sumanōmāḷārājabaha yaveṁbī mahimeyineṇeyādudiḷāvaḷe
ya kuntaḷakke kuntaḷadēśaṁ . Anupama kuntaḷasthaḷadoḷūppa suva¨rṇnavinūta ratna venisuvantiresaye kisukāḍunāḍu
saypina nele rājisi¨rppudadaṟoḷu bhuvanastuta rājadhāni celuvinakaṇi yādara visi lāśrayavoppi tōṟuguṁ . Ā
varapuramaṁ vijayaśrīdharanosadāḷvanamaḷasiṁdānvayalakṣmīdharanenisida bijjaladēva nṛpati kū
sutanadoḷe pṛthuḷaparākramanāṁtavolbijjayyaṁ mathitaripumaṁḍaḷēśa parā kramamanātanā bālyadoḷaṁ . Ā
jagatprasiddhana prasiddhavaṁśāvatāraveṁtene . moneyaḷo¨rppaṁ tōṟutu kaṭṭidalaginaṁte
sedanācarasamaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bhūtaḷadoḷu . doṟevaḍedādimaṁḍaḷika mahīśano
ḷu dhāriṇīśvarana cavuṁḍamaṁḍaḷikavīrana cāmanarēṁdranoḷpu vistarisidudalli lalāmaṁ bhujaba
ḷamaṁḍaḷikabhīmanesadaṁ vijitāṁgajarūpaṁ śau¨ryyanaṁbudhi vikramanudā ṇagegeṭṭidu
nalaṁceyanutta hulga¨rccidoḍaṁtāvaga māḍisidanalladoḍāvagavācugi jalana nidhi bhōreṁdu kavi
ye takṣaṇadiṁduppinakaṭṭe karagidaṁtuppinakaṭṭe jaḷapravāha negaḷeṁta
kava kālamahābhraghōṣaveṁbudu ḷuripu
raṇāgradoḷu . negaḷdācugimaṁḍaḷikaṁgogedaṁ vidyāvinōdanu pe¨rmmāḍinṛpa . siṁdakuḷamaṁ
ḍanaṁ dayeyiṁ dānadinīśvarā¨rccaneyineḷegasedaṁ siṁdavaṁśa cūḍā
maṇi vāgvidaciṁtāmaṇiyene negaḷdadaṭaṁ maṁḍaḷikamaṁḍana
dharavijayaṁ maṁḍaḷikamaṁḍanaṁ cāvuṁḍaṁ . Adaṭina maṁḍaḷi mikka puradēva
yanipaḍī mūvaragaṁḍaneṁdu samaradoḷu neṭṭaneṁdoḍa ¨rpparākramadiṁdī
gaḷu śrī vīrabijjalaṁ śau¨ryyāvasathaṁ cikkadēvaneṁba nenalu mikkubhaya
kuḷaśuddharā¨rbbhuvanabhuṁbhukana vīra bijjalana dore mahī puṭṭadanana
kramaṁ vīrabijjala daṁḍanāyaka mahā
dēvaṁ . Ā vīrāvatārana vaṁśāvatāraventene . javanaṁ
puṭṭidaṁgaḍavenalu vāgvī¨ryyadō¨rvvī¨ryya puruṣaratna pavaḷasuva¨rṇna
byābhāsiguṇavaṁtaṁ śā kṣiyenippa cauḍiyakkagaṁ
vidyābaḷasahitanarātimanōbaḷa harananisi puṭṭidanā gavaḷara koṭṭaradadhiṣṭhāya
ka karuṇāṁbudhi nāga Ā nāgarasana sati mahimonidhi śōnidhi negaḷdaḷudoraveta hiri
ya mana yīśvaradēva janaka gājale tāyi nāgarasaniḷāvallabhanene dhareyoḷa
vōlva nālvarudāra¨rgguṇi nāgadēvavibhugaṁ rannavvegaṁ puṭṭidaru vara dēvadaṁḍanāyakanudātta cauṁḍa
daṁḍēśvaraṁ . Ālli . dhare pogaḷguṁ parā[¨r]tthakhacarēśvarana caturōkti bhāratīśvarana rāmarēśvarananudāratāguṇagaṇāṁ prabhu
cauṁḍadhāriṇīśverana mahattarēśvarananīśvarana sujanaprasaṁnnanaṁ . Ā negaḷdīśvara kṣinidhiva camūnātha
siṁdarājyapadabhāradhu¨ryyaṁ . bhujabaḷabhīmana tanayana bhujabaḷadoḷa bhujatiḷakanamaṁtri mādhava daṁḍanāya
kanesadaṁ . maneyoḷmahāpradhānaṁ moneyoḷu vīrapradhānanene bijjaladēvana maṁtri mādhavacamūpana nupamarūpaṁ
ṟe maṁḍaḷikadaṁḍanāyakajanarāja nijabhujadaṁḍameṁdaḍe nijakiṁkararī javana kiṁkararāgalu . gaṁḍanenalu venippā
satiyaṁ mahādēvadaṁḍanāyakanāṁta . nirupamabhadralakṣaṇaguṇānvitanuṁnate nana¨rtthipa
ṇakaraṇiyu vinaṁpadaghātadiṁda vi tasade māṇbude pageya nābhiyoḷaṁ hāmaṁḍa
(ḍa)ḷēśvara bijjayyana dakṣadakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍa maṁḍaḷēśvaradaṁḍādhipa daṁḍanāthajavarāja śrī mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ daṁḍanāthatiḷakaṁ daṁḍā dhi
paṁ mādaṁ . kaḍupiṁ cuṁgeyasāhaṇi pramukharu[¨rvvī]śaṁ besaṁ bēḷdoḍugaḷa heṁ jēṟina mallidēva baṁdeḍeneṁdātana
naṁganeyara bhaṁḍāramaṁ kādaneṁdade kāmaṁ daṁḍanāthamahādēvaṁgappu nāḍu gaḷoḷu kaḷḷanaṁdu sādhi
salaṇmarenalu nāḍāḍiya ballāḷaṁ negaḷda sitagara gaṁḍaṁ . kaligaḍadallaḷaṁ mā¨rmma levara gorava
ḍisuva bīranalte sitagara gaṁḍaṁ . besagali meygali nijagali kasavaragali toḍarakali negaḷtaya kaliyeṁbesakade kalitanamaṁ ni¨rmmisidanene sitake sitagara gaṁḍaṁ [.] balayukta¨rbba
layuktaṁ kaligaḷa kali negaḷda cāgigaḷa cāgiyenalu halavu guṇaṁgaḷgō¨rbbane neleyāda guṇāṁburāśi sitagara gaṁḍaṁ . Enisida mādhavadaṁḍēśana vinutajanmabhūmiyā
nāḍoḷu celvenisida niḍuguṁdi jagajjanastutyāgrahāracūḍāratnaṁ . manuvihitācārada neleyene negaḷdaru yajanayājanayājanādhyayanādhyāpanadānasatpha
lavā vinūtaralliya mahājanaṁ nālnū¨rbbaru . dēvagurudvijāgnipitṛpūjakaruṁ natasaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhana pavitraśarīrara
śēṣavēdavidyāvidaraprata¨rkkyamahimāvasatha¨rvvibudhaikavaṁdyaru¨rbbīvinuta[¨r]jjaganuta catuḥśatasaṁkhyariḷāmarōttamaru . niḍuguṁdi
navenal rājippa nālnū¨rbbaroḷnaḍe nālnū¨rvvara lōkaviśrutakaḷāsaṁpatti nālnū¨rvva ronnuḍinālnū¨rvvara dhā[¨r]mikatvadesaka nālnū¨rvvarivā¨rppunō
¨rppaḍe nālnū¨rbbara vidvadiṣṭaphaḷadāyitvaṁ jagatpāvanaṁ . puruṣā¨rtthāyatanaikaratnakaḷa �ru vidvajjanāṁbhōjinīsarasijātasakharu ja
nōṁnatariḷādēvānvayōttaṁsaruddhata kī¨rttipramadādinātharenutuṁ dhātrītaḷaṁ santataṁ pariva¨rṇnikuvudāra cāruguṇa nālnū¨rbba
. Intenisi svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānajapasamādhiśīla guṇasaṁpaṁna¨rvvidvajjanaprasaṁnaviditavēdā(ta)¨rtthasiddhāṁtāgamaṣaṭta¨rkka
paṁcabyākaraṇādi samastaśāstrani¨rnnika¨rdēvadvijagurupadasēvānurakta¨rssaptasōma saṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitragōtra¨rssujanaika
mitraru . śrī mūlasthāna svayaṁbhūkalidēvasvāmilabdhavaraprasādaranavaratavida(dyā) vinōdarēkavākyarenipa śrīmanmahāgrahā
ra niḍuguṁdiyūroḍeyapramukha mahājanaṁ nālnū¨rbbaruṁ nijagrāmāḷaṁkaraṇaga ḷappa dha¨rmmagaḷa svadha¨rmmadiṁ paripālisuta su
khadinire . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna . vidvajjananidhāna śrīmahā maṁḍaḷēśvara vīrabijjaladēvadakṣiṇa bhujakaukṣē
yaka . sukavīṁdrajana dāyaka . sāhasōttuṁga bijjaladēvamaṁḍaḷēśvara padavīvistāraka śaraṇāyātabhītibrātanistāraka bhu
jabaḷabhīma vīrabijjayyadakṣiṇabhujadaṁḍa sitagaragaṁḍa . siṁdānvayarājyasamuddharaṇa subhaṭarābharaṇa . maṁḍaḷēśvaradaṁḍanāyakajavarāja
sūkaḷāśvārūḍhaprauḍha vatsarāja . Aṁṇanagaṁdhavāraṇa . virōdhibaḷamadanivāraṇa . pratipakṣakṣayakara . vidvadbhayaṁkara . nāma
samastaguṇasaṁpaṁnanappa śrīmat hiriya daṁḍanāyakaṁ karagavaḷaradhiṣṭhāyakaṁ bhujabaḷa daṁḍanāyakaṁ Ā niḍuguṁdiyoḷa
¨rtthijanānaṁdaṁ mādhavēśvarālayamaṁ lakṣmīnidhi mādhavadēvacamūnāthaṁ lōkavaṁdya vene māḍisidaṁ Aṁtu māḍisi yā mādhavēśvaradēva¨rgge taṁma satra
kkaṁ mattaṁ samagravāge © kaḷpaneyaṁ māḷpa saṁkaḷpadi mahāgrahāra niḍuguṁdige bijayaṁ geydu sakanṛpakāḷākrāṁta
saṁvatsaraśataṁgaḷu 1096 neya jaya saṁvatsarada mā¨rggaśira pau¨rṇnamāsyayāditya vāṁ sōmagrahaṇa puṇyadinada�lliya mahājanaṁ nā
lnū¨rvvaru sabālavṛddha ṇadoḷu naredēkastharāgiralā jagatpūjya¨rgge pādapūjeyaṁ gadyāṇa 50 koṭṭu sahiraṇya pradānavāgi pa
ḍeda paḍedeṁteṁdoḍalli yada dhanadoḷagā mādhavēśvaradēvara dēvatāpūjege patrapuṟpamumanā pūjāriya jī
vitamumaṁ saṁje sūḍareṇneymaṁ ṟiyaṁ trikālada dhūpārātriymaṁ naivēdyakke dēnagavaḷe nellu baḷḷa 2 Ā naivēdyakke mēlu bīya tiṁgaḷi
ge hoṁge hāgaṁ mahāpa¨rbbaṁgaḷa naivēdyakke pakvāṁnnamumaṁ grahaṇa saṁkramaṇagada hōmakkehavidrabyamumaṁ caitrapavi
tragaḷa bīyamumaṁ dēvāyatanada jī¨rṇōddhāramumanācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāge nālnū¨rbba¨rmmahājanaṁgaḷu sukṟitasākṣiyāgi
naḍayisuvaṁtāgi sasakaṭṭidanu Ā mādhavēśvaradēva¨rggalliyayvattokkalu biṭṭa dha¨rmma vā vūroḷanitu gāṇa voḷavanitaṟoḷaṁ pratyēkaṁ so
ḷasige pramāṇina soṁṭigeyoṁdu . bēṟūriṁ māralu baṁdeṇneya dagaḷgella pratyēka soṁṭigeyoṁdu A Eṇneyiṁ dēvara mā
le soḍarācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi naḍevuttaṁ ba¨rppudu . mattamā dēva¨rgge śrīmanmahā pradhānaṁ mahādēvadaṁṇḍanāyakaru koḍaga
nūra prabhu prajegaḷa kayyalu sa¨rvvabādhāparihāra sa¨rbbanamasyamācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyi yāgi yava¨rkkādūḍuvaṁtu paḍeda
keyyi māraholadoḷage baḍigeya sōsaneya nāyakana haṭṭagāṟavaṭṭana mattarippatta roḷage haḍuvaṇa bhō
gada mattaru hattu dēvaraṁgabhōgakke biṭṭaru . 7 . © . 7 . satrada vṛttiyeṁteṁdoḍe . niḍuguṁdiyoḷu negaḷda jakkiligēriya
nū¨rbbara¨rtthisaṁtānasurō¨rbbījaru paramadhā¨rmmikarāśritarakṣakaru dayāṁbhōnidhigaḷu parā¨rtthanidhigaḷu sakaḷāgamatatvakōvida
ru bhūnutamū¨rttigaḷu viśadekī¨rttigaḷaṅjabhavānvayōttamar . U¨rbbīdharadhai¨ryyaru divijō¨rbbījādā¨ryyaranutuvabhiva¨rṇnisa sa¨rbbō¨rbba
re jakkiligēriya nū¨rvvarubhūdēvaratnamaṁḍanarasadaru . cāruguṇākararamaḷina cāri traru sakaḷadha¨rmmarakṣakaranu
tuṁ dhāriṇi pogaḷvudu jakkiligēriya nū¨rbba¨rmmaha janaṁgaḷanolaviṁ . Aṁtanisi svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadha raṇamaunānuṣṭhāna japasamā
dhiśīlaguṇasaṁpanarappa śrīmanumahāgrahāraṁ niḍuguṁdiya jakkiligēriya mahājana nū¨rbbaru śrīpādaṁgaḷga pādapū
jeyaṁ koṭṭu sa¨rbbabādhaparihāra sa¨rbbanamasyamācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi kēriya no¨rbba mahājanaṁgaḷu kādoḍu
vaṁtāgi paḍeda keyi mattarippattumaṁ taṁma satrakka biṭṭaru Avara sthaḷaṁgaḷāvuveṁdaḍā kēriya paṁcakada saṁkamayyana śa
tada yippattanālku mattaru nasugeyalli meyana gaṇadaleraḍuṁ gaṇavu varaya mataru 6 Ā
baḷile hāḷakēṟiya mattaru 3 Aṁtu paṁcarada gōvi dimayyana śatada hoṁna holada hasugeyali mādimeyana
bhāgadoḷage mattaru 6 Ā baḷiya māḷada ma ttaru 10 kammaṁ 180 Aṁtaraḍaṁ śatada benika sahita mataru 1 kamma 780
Ā keyyiṁdāda¨rtthadiṁ brāhmaṇa¨rppaṁni[¨rbba] janaṁ naḍavutta ba¨rppadu . satrada ma
neyakke jakkiligēriya mahā vippataydake baḍi gadyāṇa
vaiydumanaḷḷasuggigā kēriya mahājanaṁ . © . © . © .
Ā satrada taḷige haṁneraḍa dhūpaguḍige Ārati ghaṁṭe
phala . © . © pri kurukṣē
yoḷaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷa ḷākṣaraṁ dhātri
yoḷu . viṁdhyāṭavīṣpatōyāsu viṣamucyaThe remaining portion is lost.
Digital edition of SII 15.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
